prompt: Show me a feature set that uses a plugin qualifier.
actual:
```aro
(Use Plugin Qualifier: Example) {
    Extract the <data> from the <request: body>.
    Return the<OK: status> for the <result>.
    Return the<PluginResult: result> with <data>.
}
```
expected:
```aro
(PickOne: Example) {
    Create the <items> with ["a", "b", "c"].
    Compute the <pick: collections.pick-random> from <items>.
    Return an <OK: status> with <pick>.
```

judge_reason: code uses <request: …> / <pathParameters: …> when the prompt never asked about HTTP
